title: Text-handling insult at Tariff Lantern Court
player_safe_summary: The party enters Tariff Lantern Court and discovers that a routine request is entangled with local pressure, reputation, and a decision that cannot be solved by force alone.
gm_deep_summary: Run the opening using the Tariff Lantern Court quickstart card, then escalate through one authority, one pressured intermediary, and one consequence if the players ignore procedure.
